title: Specialist Wanted
excerpt:

posts.author: IanTaylor (Ian Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All

Having been using Monday.com for a few years now we love it. Its been a bit of a slow burner with us, but we see the big benefits to our business now and in the future. I thus want to hire a specialist to design some boards for us and do stuff, that I’m probably not aware that Monday does. I’m sure with some playing around I could do most of what we need but I don’t have the time and I’m sure there are probably better ways than how I imagine things, in my head, for how the system would work.

The first part, of a bigger picture of what we need Monday for, is the recording of hired and off hired plant and equipment. Thus, if something were off hired it would generate emails to appropriate people etc and hire reports etc could be created.

As I said this is part of a much bigger picture of what we need from Monday, and being honest with my little knowledge I’m not 100% sure it can achieve what we need.

In the perfect world someone would come forward that lives local to our office in Burton On Trent, near Derby, UK and would be able to come into the office and we could discuss the brief and fees etc, but I’m not sure how many local UK experts there are out there. I do however want someone from the UK as I don’t want to be dealing with time differences etc.

Would love to hear from anyone that has a good knowledge of Monday.

I’m not sure if this post will place my email address so please see it below as it will be far easier to communicate via email than logging onto this portal. Its ian@sigroundworks.co.uk

Thanks for your time

Ian

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @IanTaylor - you have certainly come to the right place!

We would be more than happy to assist you in your objectives however completely understand the want/need for someone more local to you (we are based in Canada).

With that, I would recommend getting in touch with @Thomas-Omnitas from Omnitas Consulting. They are based in Sweden (so only a 1 hr difference) and will have no problems getting you to where you want to be on the platform.

Thanks, and take care.
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: Thomas-Omnitas (Thomas Karlsson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you @mark.anley for the warm recommendation!

I have reached out to @IanTaylor over email.

With regards,
